TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gaston_Browne, title = Gaston_Browne, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaston_Browne} }

S.FORM: Gaston Browne ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Gaston Browne, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Gaston Browne, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Gaston Browne ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Gaston Browne, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Gaston Browne, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ɣas~ɕton βrowne rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ɣas~ɕton βrowne, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw antiɣua an* βarβu*a taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣas~ɕton βrowne, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
